text: Action: During the dynasty phase, bow this stronghold - look at the top 3 cards of your dynasty deck. You may play a character from among those cards as if it were in your provinces. Discard the rest.
name: Kyūden Hida

text: During a conflict at this province, your opponent cannot trigger character abilities or initiate keywords from characters he or she controls. (Covert is initiated before this province is revealed.)
name: Kuni Wasteland

text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on [clan-crab] clan cards.
name: Support of the Crab

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player - your opponent loses 1 honor.
flavorText: "When you face the darkness of the Shadowlands, you must be unflinching, lest you become the subject you wish to study." - Kuni Ritsuko
name: Purifier Apprentice

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending - draw 1 card and discard 1 card from your hand. (Limit once per conflict.)
flavorText: "Few can claim to know the defences of the Wall as well as the Champion's youngest son. Yet who will follow such a child into battle?" - Hida Sanae
name: Hida Sukune

text: Each conflict this character wins while attacking is considered to be unopposed.
flavorText: "Anyone willing to take on the Shadowlands in their own domain is either a paragon of courage or foolishly reckless. I have yet to meet any paragons." - Toritaka Taguchi
name: Shadowlands Hunter

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player - you may declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict this phase. (Max 1 per phase.)
name: Hida O-Ushi

text: Action: Choose an unbroken province you control with a holding - look at the top 2 cards of your dynasty deck. You may put a character card from among them into the province faceup. (Do not discard the other cards in the province.)
name: Unyielding Sensei

text: Reaction: After this character enters play - search your dynasty deck for a character with printed cost 1 and put it into play. Shuffle.
flavorText: "A tea set this fine would go anywhere else for 2 koku. But for only you, I will make an exception."
name: Favorable Dealbroker

text: Reaction: After this character enters play - search your dynasty deck for any number of holdings, reveal them, and put them facedown underneath your stronghold province (out of play). Shuffle. Action: Put a facedown holding under your stronghold province into play in an unbroken non-stronghold province you control, discarding each other card in that province. Errata from the Imperial Law (2020-01-06)
name: Kaiu Shihobu

text: No attachments. Action: Put a (friendly) holding on the bottom of your dynasty deck - ready this character.
flavorText: Where the work of Kaiu minds falls short, Kaiu hands must follow through.
name: Kaiu Siege Force

text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: Choose a province you control - search the top 10 cards of your dynasty deck for a holding and switch it with a Kaiu Wall holding in that province. Shuffle. (The new holding is faceup.)
name: Kaiu Forges

text: Limit 1 per deck. Each Kaiu Wall holding in each adjacent province gets +2 bonus strength.
name: Northern Curtain Wall

text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: During a conflict at a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding - your opponent discards 2 random cards from his or her hand and draws 1 card.
name: River of the Last Stand

text: Limit 1 per deck. Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player, if the attacked province has a Kaiu Wall holding - Resolve the ring effect of the contested ring as if you were the attacking player.
name: Seventh Tower

text: Limit 1 per deck. During each conflict at a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding, you may look at and play the top card of your dynasty deck as if it were in your hand.
name: Third Whisker Warrens

text: Limit 1 per deck. Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player, if the attacked province has a Kaiu Wall holding - draw 1 card. (Unlimited.)
name: Watchtower of Valor

text: Other character cannot leave play during the conflict phase, except by the effects of keywords.
flavorText: "I am unworthy of the trust you place in me, my lady. I shall endeavor to earn it."
name: Daidoji Netsu

text: Reaction: After a phase begins, spend 1 fate to an unclaimed ring and choose an attachment on a character - until the end of the phase, treat that attachment as if its printed text bow were blank (except for Traits) and as if it had no skill modifiers.
name: Agasha Hiyori

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, if you are more honorable than your opponent - move the contested ring to another eligible province and reveal that province, if able. It is now the attacked province.
name: Matsu Agetoki

text: Bayushi Kachiko cannot be chosen as the target of abilities triggered by an opponent. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, bow it and choose a participating character – That character gets -2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict.
name: Yogo Asami

text: Covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.)Reaction: After this character evades a character using covert - that character cannot be declared as a defender this phase.
name: Shinjo Yasamura

text: Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor - move this character to the conflict.
flavorText: "Do not be so quick to put yourself above the Shinjo, nephew. Do you ignore or forget the lesson Moto Tsume taught our family of pride?" - Moto Rurame, to Moto Chagatai
name: Moto Eviscerator

text: Reaction: After you claim a ring during a conflict in which you are the defending player, if you are less honorable than an opponent, lose 2 honor - resolve that ring's effect as if you were the attacking player.
name: Kansen Haunt

text: While attached character is participating in a [conflict-military] conflict, it is immune to the effects of opponents' events.
flavorText: "It is a wonder that anyone can fight in that thing." - Kakita Kaezin
name: Reinforced Plate

text: During [conflict-military] conflicts, if you control a holding on an unbroken province, attached character gains covert.
flavorText: "You'll get used to the smell" - Yasuki Fuzake
name: Subterranean Guile

text: Reaction: After an opponent passes on declaring a conflict, if he or she controls 1 or more ready characters - gain 2 fate.
name: Fruitful Respite

text: Action: During a conflict in which you are attacking, if you control a holding – until the end of the conflict, the attacked province gets -2 strength (to a minimum of 0).
name: Siege Warfare

text: Action: Lose 2 honor. Choose an opponent – until the end of the phase, treat each of that opponent's provinces as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits), including provinces that are revealed later this phase.
name: Desolation

text: Action: During a conflict - until the end of the conflict, each defending character cannot be bowed or moved home by opponents' card effects and does not bow as the result of conflict resolution.
name: The Strength of the Mountain

text: Courtesy. Sincerity. Action: If you have claimed the [element-air] ring, choose a province - discard each card in that province and refill it faceup. (Limit 3 times per round.)
flavorText: "This council...could serve...to learn much...from our young...champion."
name: Isawa Eju

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, sacrifice it. Choose a discard pile – shuffle that discard pile into its owner's corresponding deck.
flavorText: "No wonder they're always so weak and scrawny." - Hiruma Izumi
name: Slovenly Scavenger

text: Attach to a unique [clan-crab] character. Ancestral. Restricted. Attached character gains: "Reaction: After you draw a card during a conflict in which this character is participating - your opponent discards 1 random card from their hand."
name: Kikyo
